text: Of the following casualties, which would you care for first? The casualty who is:

options.text: In shock without apparent injuries, but conscious.
Unconscious and lying on his back.
Bleeding from the forehead, but conscious.
Unconscious and lying on his stomach.

explanation: According to the ABC (Airway, Breathing, Circulation) priority, an unconscious patient on their back is at immediate risk of airway obstruction (tongue or secretions). Stabilizing the airway takes precedence over other non-life-threatening injuries.
